name: Grilled Beef Kababs
recipeIngredient: 4 lbs beef sirloin, thinly sliced across the grain
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow bowl, mix together the flour, paprika, garlic powder, onion powder, oregano, salt, and pepper.
2. Add the thinly sliced beef sirloin to the seasoned flour mixture, coating each piece evenly.
3. Allow the coated meat pieces to marinate in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes, or up to several hours for best flavor.
4. Preheat a grill to medium-high heat.
5. Thread the marinated beef onto skewers, leaving small gaps between each piece for even cooking.
6. Place the skewered meat on the hot grill and cook for about 3-4 minutes per side, until well browned and cooked to desired doneness.
7. Remove from heat and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
